allow: Bash(distill "Did document\(\) succeed? What exports or importFrom lines were added or changed? Return a concise summary.")
Bash(distill "Did sig_labels run without errors? What does the output look like? Return: SUCCESS or FAIL, plus the output columns and row count.")
Bash(distill "Did all statistics tests pass? Return: PASS or FAIL, plus any failing test names and error messages.")
Bash(distill "Did R CMD check pass? List all ERRORs and WARNINGs \(not NOTEs\). Return: PASS or FAIL with a bullet list of any ERRORs/WARNINGs found.")
Bash(distill "Did the example run without errors? Show the output or error message.")
Bash(distill "Did document\(\) succeed? Return: PASS or FAIL, and any warnings or errors.")
Bash(distill "Did the check pass? Return: PASS or FAIL. List all ERRORs, WARNINGs, and NOTEs.")
Bash(distill "Did all tests pass? Return PASS or FAIL, then list any failing tests with their error messages.")
Bash(distill "Return only the final test summary line showing FAIL/WARN/SKIP/PASS counts.")
Bash(distill "Did load_all\(\) succeed? Return PASS or FAIL and any error messages.")
Bash(distill "What are the column names and what do the first few rows look like? Show column names and sample rows.")
Bash(distill "Did the script complete successfully? Return PASS or FAIL. If FAIL, show the full error message and which line it failed on.")
Bash(distill "Show the full contents of the dataframe including all rows and columns. Format as a readable table.")
Bash(distill "Show the full table comparing linear, exp_tz, and exp_zhao18 slopes for CH4. Include site, slope, r_square, flag, fit_type columns.")
Bash(distill "Show both tables clearly with all values.")
Bash(distill "Show the table with all values.")
Bash(distill "Show the full per-site drift table and the summary by gas. Include drift_s, window_s, r_square, flag columns.")
Bash(distill "Return the final test summary line with FAIL/WARN/SKIP/PASS counts.")
Bash(distill "Did documentation regenerate successfully? Return PASS or FAIL.")
Bash(distill "Show both tables \(CH4 and N2O\) with sliding vs fixed slope, r_square, and flag for each site.")
Bash(distill "Did the script complete without errors? Return: PASS or FAIL, followed by any error messages.")
